instruction: Write a FreeMarker macro `renderButton` that accepts `label`, optional `href`, and optional `variant` defaulting to "primary". Render an anchor when href is provided, otherwise a button element. Escape label and href.
code: <#-- Macro: renderButton(label, href?, variant="primary") --> <#macro renderButton label href="" variant="primary"> <#if href?has_content> ${label?html} <#else>
